productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Whalf Striper White Top
description: Composition Striped round neck knitted sweater in white, green, blue and grey, made of 100% cotton, with small gathers at centre front neckline, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed hem, logo embroidered on lower hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash below 40°C Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, do not tumble dry, do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Lovely soft shades of mint, green and grey are arranged in body-flattering stripes on this lightweight knitted sweater from adidas. Prove to the world that adidas are not just about Sports – they're also about creating gorgeous casual clothing that you'll want to wear again and again. This sweater has a deep enough neckline that you'll be able to wear it over a shirt when the air conditioning gets too cold in the office. Model's statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.7" and chest 33"
